name: dialog_state
description: a dialog agent managing conversation slots world; actions ask, fill_slot, confirm, complete

card.description: a dialog agent managing conversation slots world; actions ask, fill_slot, confirm, complete

rules: There are three slots to collect: destination, date, guests.
'ask' marks a slot as pending: the named slot if given and still empty, otherwise the first empty slot.
'fill_slot' records a value into the named slot (or the pending slot) and clears it from pending; any value can only be set when one is provided.
Re-filling any slot invalidates a prior confirmation and returns the dialog to the 'collecting' phase.
'confirm' is only accepted when every slot is filled; it sets confirmed and moves to the 'confirming' phase.
'complete' is only accepted on a fully filled, confirmed form; it moves the dialog to the terminal 'done' phase.
Once 'done', the dialog is terminal and slots no longer change.

emit.report: Dialog [{status}]: {filled_count}/3 slots filled, asking about {pending}, confirmed={confirmed}.
